roles.name: ENA Owner
roles.reasoning: Holds ownership over token minting, staking parameters, and rescue operations.

roles.name: Mint Operator
roles.reasoning: Can mint USDe (even with block caps), directly expanding supply.

roles.name: Protocol Controller
roles.reasoning: Can change mint/redeem limits, disable core flows, and transfer custody assets.

roles.name: Role Admin
roles.reasoning: Can grant or revoke AccessControl roles, effectively reshaping all permissions.

roles.name: Staking Vault
roles.reasoning: Exclusive entity allowed to withdraw assets from the USDe Silo.

roles.name: Staking Owner Rescuer
roles.reasoning: Owner can pull arbitrary tokens from the staking contract via rescue.

roles.name: Redeem Operator
roles.reasoning: Controls privileged redemption calls that move collateral out of the system.

roles.name: Reward Funding Manager
roles.reasoning: Authorized party injects rewards into StakedUSDe, impacting user yield.

roles.name: Blacklist Manager
roles.reasoning: Can blacklist addresses from StakedUSDe, restricting user access.

roles.name: Role Renouncer
roles.reasoning: Only allows an account to relinquish its own role, reducing privileges.

roles.name: Public User Functions
roles.reasoning: Open ERC20/user interactions such as transfers and approvals available to everyone.

roles.name: Staking Participants
roles.reasoning: Regular staking actions (stake/unstake/withdraw) available to all users.

roles.name: Cooldown Initiator
roles.reasoning: Any user can start cooldown timers for their shares/assets when allowed.

roles.name: Cooldown-Free User Actions
roles.reasoning: Standard user withdrawals/redemptions requiring the system to be out of cooldown.
